calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Land Improvement Company or Jerry Derden.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 20, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 20, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 12, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Land Improvement Company and Jerry Derden as follows:

Damages/Principal - $146,704.48.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,038.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $565.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $157,807.48.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph 3 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
